title: Leaving Zou
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on leaving zou within the Leaving Zou storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Listen... it's him we're talking about here. For all we know,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He might have gone all lovely-dovey and okayed the marriage.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I can't even pretend that that isn't a possibility.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: We shall await your arrival in Wano!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'll build some weapons to deal with Kaidou!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: If you need anything from us, let us know!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: I'll round up the Wano Samurai for ya!!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Allow me to assist you in descending the elephant!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Try to avoid running into big mom at all costs!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: She's an empress of this ocean!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: where the yonkou big mom, with whom lofty picked a fight, awaits.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: else- where, on the grand line

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Wait a minute, VIVI! You really are in a good mood today, aren't you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Viv! Makes a move?! The world moves?!

summary: Leaving Zou: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
